headline: 3 High-Flying Stocks We’re Skeptical Of
summary: Expensive stocks typically earn their valuations through superior growth rates that other companies simply can’t match. The flip side though is that these lofty expectations make them particularly susceptible to drawdowns when market sentiment shifts.

headline: Wall Street Lunch: Quantinuum Soars 12% On Nasdaq Debut Following $1.7B IPO
summary:
Quantinuum (QNT) debuted on the Nasdaq at $68 a share, up 12% from its IPO price.
The quantum computing company, which is majority owned by Honeywell (HON), sold 28M shares at $60 each.

headline: Hilton Unveils New Workplace Research Showing That Even as AI Is Reshaping Work, the Real Advantage Is Human
summary: MCLEAN, Va., June 04, 2026--As work becomes more digital, fast-paced and increasingly disconnected, a critical driver of workplace performance in every sector is being overlooked: human-led hospitality. Today, Hilton unveiled "The Hospitality Mindset: A New Blueprint for Culture and Performance for Any Industry," a new report where workers overwhelmingly cite human-centered factors as the strongest drivers of productivity and satisfaction at work.
